scripts.typecheck: tsc -b apps/tui apps/cli packages/contracts packages/client packages/ui-model packages/runtime packages/session packages/config packages/tools packages/pty packages/sandbox packages/testing
scripts.test: npx bun test packages/config/test/*.test.ts packages/runtime/test/*.test.ts packages/ui-model/test/*.test.ts packages/client/test/*.test.ts packages/pty/test/*.test.ts packages/sandbox/test/*.test.ts --timeout 60000 && npm --workspace @natalia/tui run test
scripts.verify: npm run format && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run guard:imports
